query: SELECT section, DATE(createdAt) as data, COUNT(*) as totale FROM news_items WHERE section IN ('ai','startup') AND DATE(createdAt) >= '2026-03-28' GROUP BY section, DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY data DESC, section;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT section, DATE(createdAt) as data, COUNT(*) as totale FROM news_items WHERE section IN ('ai','startup') AND DATE(createdAt) >= '2026-03-28' GROUP BY section, DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY data DESC, section;
